docket_entries.description: PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING, AN AGENCY OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT DA TUNG INTERNATIONAL GROUP INC., DBA DA TUNG INC. YANG, PING

ORDER SETTING HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE DISCOVERY
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-12-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, PETITIONER DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING'S PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE DISCOVERY IS CONTINUED TO JULY 29, 2011, FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS INCLUDING PROOF OF SERVICE, TO DEPARTMENT 301, NO LATER THAN 7/20/11, IN CONFORMITY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). COURTESY COPIES SHALL REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-29-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, PETITIONER DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING'S PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE DISCOVERY IS OFF CALENDAR. ENTIRE CASE WAS DISMISSED ON 7/25/11. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED
